def re_arrange(arr, count):
    positives = [x for x in arr if x > 0]
    negatives = [x for x in arr if x < 0]
    return [positives[i] if i % 2 == 0 else negatives[i % 2] for i in range(len(positives))]

def re_arrange(arr):
    negatives = [x for x in arr if x < 0]
    positives = [x for x in arr if x > 0]
    result = []
    for i in range(len(positives) + len(negatives)):
        if i % 2 == 0:
            result.append(positives[i // 2])
        else:
            result.append(negatives[i // 2])
    return result

def re_arrange(arr):
    n = len(arr)
    negatives = [x for x in arr if x < 0]
    positives = [x for x in arr if x > 0]
    result = []
    for i in range(n):
        if i % 2 == 0:
            result.append(negatives[i//2])
        else:
            result.append(positives[i//2])
    return result

def re_arrange(arr):
    n = len(arr)

    positives = [x for x in arr if x > 0]

            result.append(negatives[i//2])

            result.append(positives[i//2])
